raw_consumer_statement:
To the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau ( CFBB ) : I am writing to file a complaint against American Express for its unreasonable refusal to handle my billing dispute. 

On XX/XX/year>, I made a purchase on XXXX via my American Express card ( ending with XXXX ), with the transaction amount being {$67.00}. Later, due to a price reduction issue related to this purchase, I attempted to open a billing dispute with American Express following the proper procedure. However, the bank responded that Based on the information you've provided, we're unable to open this dispute simply because they claimed the billed amount was correct and there was no billing error.

This response is highly unsatisfactory. American Express has failed to address the core issue of the price - related dispute. Their explanation that prices are locked - in once the purchase is complete ignores the reasonable right of consumers to seek resolution for price adjustments. Moreover, their process lacks flexibility and proper consideration of consumer concerns, reflecting poor management and an uncooperative attitude.

I urge the CFBB to investigate this matter, require American Express to properly review my dispute, and improve their dispute - handling process to protect consumer rights.

Thank you for your attention to this complaint. 

Sincerely, XXXX
